# Construction Station

> Licensed California general contractor (CSLB #1108879) serving the Inland Empire since 2008. Kitchen remodeling, bathroom remodeling, ADUs (accessory dwelling units), room additions, windows & doors, outdoor living, and commercial construction. Based in Yucaipa, CA — 33145 Yucaipa Blvd, Yucaipa, CA 92399. Phone: 909-797-6333. A+ BBB rating, 5.0-star Google rating.

Construction Station serves 23+ cities across San Bernardino and Riverside counties, including Redlands, Yucaipa, Loma Linda, San Bernardino, Riverside, Fontana, Rancho Cucamonga, Ontario, Upland, and the High Desert. ADU services extend to the Temecula Valley, Coachella Valley, and Orange County–adjacent communities. Every project includes a free design consultation, transparent line-item quotes, and a two-year workmanship warranty.

## Services

- [Kitchen Remodeling](https://constructionstation.com/services/kitchen-remodeling): Custom cabinetry, countertops, tile, and full kitchen renovations
- [Bathroom Remodeling](https://constructionstation.com/services/bathroom-remodeling): Walk-in showers, freestanding tubs, and master-suite bathrooms
- [ADU Construction](https://constructionstation.com/services/adu): Detached ADUs, garage conversions, JADUs, and room-addition ADUs — design, permits, and construction under one contract
- [Room Additions](https://constructionstation.com/services/room-additions): Bedrooms, family rooms, and second-story additions
- [Windows & Doors](https://constructionstation.com/services/windows-and-doors): Energy-efficient window and door installation
- [Outdoor Living](https://constructionstation.com/services/outdoor-living): Covered patios, pergolas, and outdoor kitchens
- [Commercial Services](https://constructionstation.com/services/commercial): Tenant improvements, office renovations, and retail buildouts

## ADU Resources

- [ADU Costs](https://constructionstation.com/services/adu/costs): Per-square-foot pricing and total project cost breakdowns
- [ADU Basics](https://constructionstation.com/services/adu/basics): California ADU law fundamentals
- [ADU Floor Plans](https://constructionstation.com/services/adu/floor-plans): Sample plans from 400 to 1,200 sq ft with pricing
- [ADU Financing](https://constructionstation.com/services/adu/financing): Loan and financing options for ADU projects
- [ADU Investment](https://constructionstation.com/services/adu/investment): Rental income and ROI analysis
- [Garage Conversion Cost](https://constructionstation.com/services/adu/garage-conversion-cost): Cost guide for converting a garage to an ADU
- [Garage Conversion Permits](https://constructionstation.com/services/adu/garage-conversion-permits): Permit requirements for garage conversions
- [ADU Regulations by City](https://constructionstation.com/services/adu#cities): City-specific ADU rules — size limits, setbacks, permits, and impact fees for 29+ Southern California cities (e.g. /services/adu/yucaipa, /services/adu/redlands, /services/adu/riverside)

## Company

- [Contact](https://constructionstation.com/contact): Free estimate requests, team, hours, and location
- [Reviews](https://constructionstation.com/reviews): Customer reviews and Google rating
- [FAQ](https://constructionstation.com/faq): Common questions about licensing, pricing, timelines, and service area
- [Financing](https://constructionstation.com/financing): 0% promotional financing up to 144 months via Enhancify
- [Blog](https://constructionstation.com/blog): Remodeling cost guides, design trends, and homeowner education

## Service Areas

- [Service area pages](https://constructionstation.com/areas/redlands): City pages follow the pattern /areas/[city] for Redlands, Yucaipa, Loma Linda, San Bernardino, Riverside, Fontana, Rancho Cucamonga, Ontario, Upland, Claremont, Pomona, Chino, Chino Hills, Victorville, Hesperia, and more
